name: pi-67-desktop
description: Pi-first desktop client for Windows x64 and macOS Apple Silicon.
author: bigKING67

scripts.build: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm run build:apps
scripts.build:apps: corepack pnpm --filter @pi67/renderer run build && corepack pnpm --filter @pi67/agent-host run build && corepack pnpm --filter @pi67/desktop run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm run build && playwright test
scripts.performance:prepare: corepack pnpm run build && node eng/performance/prepare-packaged-app.mjs
scripts.performance:measure: corepack pnpm run performance:prepare && corepack pnpm run performance:renderer && corepack pnpm run performance:electron
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run check:architecture && corepack pnpm run check:dead-code && corepack pnpm run check:structure && corepack pnpm run check:production-transport && corepack pnpm run test
scripts.package:native:unsigned: corepack pnpm run build && node eng/packaging/package-native-unsigned.mjs
scripts.package:win: corepack pnpm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.package:mac: corepack pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64
